meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Microsoft Surface repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Microsoft Surface Repair in Manitoba | MobileTechLab
page.metaDescription: Expert Microsoft Surface repair services in Winnipeg and Winkler. Screen replacement, battery replacement, charging issues, data recovery, and liquid damage repair.
page.heroDescription: Professional Microsoft Surface repair services in Winnipeg and Winkler. Screen replacement, battery issues, charging problems, data recovery, and liquid damage repair for all Surface Pro, Laptop, and Book models.

heroImage.alt: Microsoft Surface repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Fix cracked or malfunctioning Surface Pro, Laptop, and Book displays.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore your Surface's battery life—specialized integrated battery service.

services.name: Charging Issues
services.description: Resolve Surface Connect port, USB-C charging, and power connectivity issues.

services.name: Data Recovery
services.description: Professional data recovery from damaged or non-booting Surface devices.

services.name: Liquid Damage
services.description: Expert liquid damage repair for water-damaged Surface devices.

services.name: Surface Pen Issues
services.description: Diagnose and resolve Surface Pen connectivity and digitizer problems.

advantage_pillars.title: Surface Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg and Winkler's Microsoft Surface repair experts.

advantage_pillars.title: All Surface Models
advantage_pillars.description: From Surface Pro 11 to legacy Surface Pro 3.

advantage_pillars.title: Business & Enterprise
advantage_pillars.description: Quick turnaround for business-critical Surface device repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty.

models_description: We repair all Microsoft Surface models and generations.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Surface repair costs are driven by the display and integrated design. Microsoft's official Surface support covers battery diagnostics and firmware updates.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that a Surface screen replacement can cost nearly as much as a budget laptop. iFixit's Surface teardowns show why these are among the most challenging devices to repair.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your Surface's current value, we'll explain that clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery or data transfer is often still possible.

faqs.question: How long does a Microsoft Surface screen replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most Surface screen replacements are completed within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Can you replace the battery in a Surface device?
faqs.answer: Yes! Surface devices have integrated batteries requiring specialized tools.

faqs.question: Is data recovery possible from a damaged Surface?
Do you repair Surface Pro and Surface Laptop models?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We repair all Microsoft Surface models.

faqs.question: What if my Surface has liquid damage?
faqs.answer: Bring it in immediately—quick action increases recovery chances.

faqs.question: Do you offer service in Winkler too?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide Surface repair in both Winnipeg and Winkler, Manitoba.

service_area_note: Serving Winnipeg (St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona) and Winkler, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
